initial_entry.name: qmd as md
initial_entry.author: Daniel Borek
initial_entry.description: This plugin provides an initial support for viewing files with .qmd extension. QMD files contain a combination of markdown and executable code cells and are a format supported by Quarto open source publishing system.

current_entry.name: qmd as md
current_entry.author: Daniel Borek
current_entry.description: Edit, preview, and render Quarto (.qmd) files with executable code cells via Quarto to PDF, DOCX, HTML, or reveal.js.
